title: neobolusia virginea
intro: Neobolusia virginea, also known as the African teak or West African teak, is a species of plant native to tropical Africa, particularly in the regions of Cameroon, Republic of the Congo, and Nigeria. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neobolusia virginea include the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Neobolusia virginea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
